knowledge.title: Mirage A site: ticket + jungle anchor
knowledge.description: CT A: one player ticket (close angle on A main exit), one player jungle (long angle from CT spawn). Ticket traps A main entries, jungle trades. Both on site = double frag from a flash over A main.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: ticket-jungle is the canonical Mirage A setup, ~74% A hold rate

knowledge.title: Mirage B site: bench + market anchor
knowledge.description: CT B: one player bench (close angle on apartments exit), one player market (long angle from B short). Bench traps apps push, market trades the second player. Mirage B crossfire is one of the most consistent setups in CS2.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: bench-market crossfire is standard Mirage B

knowledge.title: Mirage mid: connector AWP
knowledge.description: CT AWP from connector covers mid sightline AND can rotate to A in 4 seconds. Top mid is a higher-risk angle reserved for early-round picks. Connector is the safer default position.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector AWP averages ~1.2 mid kills per round on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage A execute: smoke CT + smoke jungle + molly stairs
knowledge.description: Standard A execute: smoke CT (cuts rotate from CT spawn), smoke jungle (cuts long angle), molly stairs (clears default plant area), flash over A main x2 for entries. ~73% plant rate on Mirage A with full utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility A execute is the canonical Mirage T A strat

knowledge.title: Mirage B execute: smoke CT + smoke window + molly bench
knowledge.description: B execute from apartments: smoke CT (cuts rotate), smoke market window (cuts long angle), molly bench (clears the close hold), flash from apps for entry. Plant for short angle. ~70% plant rate.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: apps B execute is most reliable Mirage B strat

knowledge.title: Mirage mid smoke: window smoke wins mid duels
knowledge.description: Smoke window before any mid push. Window smoke neutralizes the connector AWP and opens A or B split options. The smoke takes ~3 seconds to expand — throw before commit, not after.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: window smoke is in ~85% of T mid pushes on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage pistol: T A ramp stack
knowledge.description: Mirage T pistol: stack 4-5 A ramp + 1 mid for fast A hit. Plant default; mid player rotates as a trade. ~58% T pistol win rate with the ramp stack.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: A ramp stack is the highest-WR Mirage T pistol

knowledge.title: Mirage force buy: A through ramp with armor + Galils
knowledge.description: Mirage force buys hit A through ramp — the same angles as the pistol stack but with rifles. B forces have lower success because apartments has too many angles to clear under-buy.
knowledge.situation: T force buy decision on Mirage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: Mirage A ramp force wins ~40%, B force ~25%

knowledge.title: Mirage save: AWP through palace or connector
knowledge.description: Mirage AWP saves: route back through palace (slow, safe) or connector (fast but exposed). Choose connector when you have a teammate trading for you, palace when alone.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Mirage AWP retention >75%

knowledge.title: Mirage A main: jiggle peek before commit
knowledge.description: A main gives a free jiggle peek to clear ticket and jungle. Tap A for one frame at the corner — bait the shot, then push. Most A main entry deaths come from blind pushes into ticket holds.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: jiggle peek + commit reduces A main entry deaths by ~30%

knowledge.title: Mirage window AWP duel: pre-aim head level on the gap
knowledge.description: Window AWP duels are decided by pre-aim. The window opens at head level — pre-aim the gap as you peek. Most window AWP duels go to whoever already had the crosshair on it.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top AWPers hold window with pre-aimed crosshair >95%

knowledge.title: Mirage apps duel: spray transfer is standard
knowledge.description: Apps-to-B duels are close range — spray transfer (kill one, walk crosshair to the next) wins more than tap firing. Apps duels happen at <8m and reward muscle memory spray.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: spray-transfer kills account for ~40% of apps frags

knowledge.title: Mirage mid contact: rotate to A on a win
knowledge.description: If your mid player wins the first contact (window or top mid), commit to A within 5 seconds. The mid kill takes a CT off the rotate; A becomes 4v3 with full utility.
knowledge.situation: Mid contact win, deciding next call
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: mid-pick into A execute wins ~62% on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage IGL: connector info gates the call
knowledge.description: Send a connector player on every default round. Connector gives sound cues for both sites within 25 seconds and is the highest-value information point on Mirage.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Mirage IGLs base ~60% of commits on connector info

knowledge.title: Mirage A fake: 30-second commit
knowledge.description: A fakes on Mirage commit utility for 30 seconds (smokes + flashes + gunfire) then re-rotate to B through apps. CT will burn rotates. 30 seconds is the standard pull-time on Mirage.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 30-second A fake to B execute wins ~58% on Mirage

knowledge.title: Mirage A retake: from connector with smoke + flash
knowledge.description: A retake from connector with smoke (cuts ticket) + flash + 3-stack push. Avoid jungle retakes — jungle is exposed to A main lurk. Connector retakes win ~50%.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector retakes win ~50% on Mirage A

knowledge.title: Mirage B post-plant: hold from short lurk
knowledge.description: Post-plant B: lurk back to B short corner to hold the retake from market AND see the rotate from A. Avoid sitting bench — bench is the first angle the retake utility hits.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: short lurk post-plant outperforms bench by ~12 points

knowledge.title: Mirage A plant: default behind ticket box
knowledge.description: Default A plant is behind ticket box, exposed to jungle and connector. The lurker can pre-fire jungle defuse. Avoid plants in the open — CT can defuse from cover behind the column.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: behind-ticket plant has highest post-plant WR on Mirage A
